steps.title: Recognize the paradox
steps.content: The passage presents a paradox: water is critical for life, yet during Earth's earliest history—when oceans covered the planet—water likely ______ biomolecule formation. The although signals that the blank must convey something contrary to water's enabling role.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the paradox
steps.content: Hampered means to obstruct or hinder—this directly answers the paradox. The other choices—reflected, imitated, and exploited—don't express any sense of obstruction or prevention. That matches choice B — B is correct.
